diagrams.title: Function Types Classification
diagrams.description: Shows how functions are classified based on injectivity and surjectivity with Venn diagram
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the four types of functions and their relationships

diagrams.title: Function Composition f∘g
diagrams.description: Arrow diagram showing how composition works: input x goes through g to get g(x), then through f to get f(g(x))
elements: Set B (codomain of g, domain of f)
diagrams.purpose: Understand how function composition works as a two-step mapping

diagrams.title: Inverse Function Visualization
diagrams.description: Shows f and its inverse f⁻¹ as mirror images across the identity line y=x
diagrams.purpose: Understand inverse function as reflection and verify bijectivity condition
